## Problem
What user problem are we solving?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature behavior clearly.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Technical Scope
- Affected API routes:
- Affected Firestore collections/documents:
- Affected UI components:

## Risks
What could break or become expensive?

## Notes
Any links, screenshots, or examples.
